message:
feat(net): integrate Unix sockets with reactor for async I/O

Wire up UnixListener and UnixStream to the reactor for event-driven
I/O instead of busy-polling:

UnixListener:
- Add Registration field for reactor events
- Implement UnixListenerSource wrapper for Source trait
- Register with READABLE interest on bind

UnixStream:
- Add Registration field for reactor events
- Implement UnixStreamSource wrapper for Source trait
- Register with READABLE|WRITABLE interest on connect

IoDriverHandle:
- Add try_lock() for non-blocking lock attempts

Worker:
- Add optional io_driver handle
- Implement Leader/Follower I/O driving pattern
- Leader polls reactor with short timeout while idle

This enables efficient async Unix socket operations by leveraging
epoll/kqueue events rather than spinning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
